featureName: Bond Regime and Fixed-Income Scenario Lab

blocker.summary: DOCS-001 is resolved: the current payload validator and Market Brief contract group pass with one registry-ordered bond-regime-lab coverage row. The complete repository selftest remains nonzero at 342/3 on three shared provider-credential assertions outside this docs remediation. Scope 5 remains Blocked and certification is untouched.

executionHistory.summary: Authored the greenfield fixed-income regime and scenario-analysis specification from repository evidence and primary-source research. Defined 6 actors, 6 use cases, 14 business scenarios, 58 requirements, a capability model, source-rights and data-freshness constraints, duration-aware credit corroboration, Simple and Power decision contracts, and a transparent carry-rate-spread-convexity scenario model. Product implementation and foreign-owned design, planning, test, report, and user-validation artifacts have not started.

Authored the UX-owned UI Wireframes and User Flows sections in spec.md for one cache-first Bond Regime Lab route with shared Simple/Power model state. Defined 3 responsive screen compositions, reusable primitives, exact decision and evidence hierarchy, scenario controls, data-state degradation, accessibility behavior, and 6 mapped user flows. Focused UX1-UX5 and UX8-UX9 checks passed. The mandatory Tier 1 artifact lint remained blocked by missing foreign-owned design.md, scopes.md, report.md, and uservalidation.md, so no UX completedPhaseClaim, status transition, or certification mutation was recorded.

Authored the from-analysis technical design for one cache-first static Bond Regime and Fixed-Income Scenario Lab. Defined the capability foundation, source-rights-safe observation adapters, common-date adjusted-close credit ratios, duration-confound and two-key credit classifiers, official Treasury nominal and real-yield paths, explicit unavailable or session-only optional confirmations, unit-safe carry-rate-spread-convexity scenarios, one Simple/Power view model, exact implementation surfaces, fourteen technical scenario contracts, and dirty-worktree rollback boundaries. No product, planning, report, user-validation, status, completed-phase, or certification fields were changed.

Reconciled the incomplete foundation-first plan into five sequential scopes and completed every plan-owned handoff artifact. Preserved analyst, UX, and design content; repaired Markdown tables and duplicate headings; mapped all fourteen business scenarios to stable SCN-003-001 through SCN-003-014 contracts; synchronized fifty-six Markdown and JSON Test Plan rows; and created substantive report and user-validation templates. Artifact lint, Plan P1-P4 checks, JSON contract validation, Markdown structure checks, editor diagnostics, and the 276-test Research Lab baseline passed. The optional Python schema wrapper skipped because PyYAML or jsonschema is not installed, and a dependency-free schema validator passed instead. Product implementation, product browser tests, scope completion, status transition, and certification were not claimed.

Implemented and browser-validated Scopes 1-4 and the owned product/test surfaces of Scope 5. Final Bond Regime browser suite passed 26/26; static, registry, source-rights, diagnostics, artifact-lint, and path-integrity checks passed. Scope 5 remains Blocked because the excluded Market Brief payload coverage list lacks bond-regime-lab, leaving node scripts/selftest.mjs at 342 passed and 1 failed; state-transition guard remains nonterminal and certification fields were not changed.

Resolved the managed Market Brief coverage drift with one registry-ordered coverage-only Bond Regime row. Payload validation, registry/docs consistency, artifact lint, diagnostics, diff check, and the exact 343/0 repository selftest passed. No live recommendation, generated market narrative, implementation logic, scope checkbox, status, or certification field was changed; Scope 5 returns to bubbles.implement for S5-T13 evidence reconciliation and S5-T14 rerun.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: DOCS-001 is resolved in the current payload and the exact payload validator passes. The complete repository selftest remains nonzero at 342/3 on three shared provider-credential assertions. Scope 5 remains nonterminal; bubbles.implement owns those failures and the S5-T14 governance rerun. Certification remains not_started.
